ticket.title: Login button is unresponsive on Safari iOS
ticket.description: When tapping the login button on iPhone Safari, nothing happens. Other browsers work. Repro: open the app on iOS 17 Safari, tap login.

specBundle.content:
# Fix iOS Safari login button

The login button does not fire its onClick handler on iOS Safari due to a passive touch listener interaction. Switch to a non-passive touchend handler so the click event reaches the React onClick.

## Acceptance criteria
- Tapping the login button in iOS 17 Safari triggers the existing onLogin handler.
- Existing desktop click behavior unchanged.

- [ ] Replace passive touch listener with explicit touchend handler in `src/components/LoginButton.tsx`
- [ ] Add a regression test that simulates a touchend event
- [ ] Manually verify on iOS 17 Safari simulator
